def build_agent(sandbox):
    '''Evolve this function to solve the task.'''
    # Minimal placeholder: single body at origin
    body = sandbox.add_beam(x=15.0, y=7.5, width=1.0, height=0.3, density=1.0)
    return body

    # Apply controlled acceleration towards target_x (30.0)
    if step_count < 50:  # Extended force application for sustained momentum
        agent_body.ApplyForce(force=(10.0, 0.0))  # Corrected method name and parameter format
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
